description: The field team has returned a 'red-line' drawing showing a minor change made during construction. A designer must update the official CAD drawing.

nodes.task_description: Scan and upload the red-lined drawing to the document management system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully digitizes and logs the red-line markup.

nodes.task_description: Check out the corresponding CAD drawing to begin edits.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully checks out the drawing, locking it from edits by others.

nodes.task_description: Update the CAD drawing to reflect the red-lined changes and submit it as a new revision for approval.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent updates the design, creates a new revision (e.g., Rev B), and submits it to the approval workflow.
